Home

Three Bean Salads

author: Jeanne Marrs

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 1 can green beans
  • 1 can yellow beans
  • 1 can kidney beans
  • Sweet onion
  • Green pepper
  • Celery
  • 1/4 cup oil
  • 1/2 cup vinegar
  • 1/2 cup sugar

Directions

Drain beans. Slice sweet onion, green pepper and celery. Add to beans. Mix oil/vinegar/sugar and pour over beans.
